base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of missile_enemy — a projectile (gun_proj) from 1981 galaga. Enemy bullet — small downward-traveling projectile dropped by diving enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Enemy bullet — small downward-traveling projectile dropped by diving enemies; varies color based on firer
